consultancy for your AI and digital needs.

Agentic AI | Crypto Trading | IT Project Management

agentic ai setups

I am a tech geek at heart and have spent countless hours implementing different configurations of OpenClaw on Linux and Windows with local LLMs and APIs. My own agent has helped me create this business and is working around the clock on multiple initiatives. If you awnt to get setup with your own AI agent that can do things for you then reach out for a chat.

FREE - Initial discussion to understand your needs.

$4,999 - Hands-on implementation with guidance and support.

$9,999 - Full implementation with services and equipment included for a standard local LLM.

crypto trading

I have been in crypto since 2017 and have gone through mutiple cycle with huge upsides and downsides alike. I've also spent the last 2 years privately trading and working with Defi projects as my full time focus. So if you need some help to get into the sapce and want to know the best practises without any fluff then I can get you started.

FREE - Initial discussion to understand your needs.

$499 - Personalised guidance for you to get started.

$1,999 - Personalised portfolio to fit your goals and security setups.

it project management

I am a highly adaptable, delivery-focused IT professional with a passion for leading people and driving strategic impacts through the trusted relationships I build. I have strong leadership experience with a core capability is in Program Management where I have a proven record of translating business goals into robust plans and managing large technical teams to deliver optimal outcomes.

linkedin.com/in/kunallohia

Check out and contact me through my LinkedIn profile for any opportunities.

I'm available for contract engagements at a daily rate.

get in touch

My aim is to share my knowledge and provide real value for any of the consultancy services offered above. If any of those interest you and you'd like to learn more then please book a free initial call to discuss your needs.
